title: Undertale Origins Pack
description: Adds Undertale characters as playable origins
body:
# DISCLAIMER:
> This pack requires the use of APUGLI, APPLI, PEKHUI, EXTRA KEYBINDS (Curseforge) and the CUSTOM RESOURCEPACK inside the .zip file along with the Datapack.
> NO BUTS.

# ❖ About ❖
This datapack adds the seven human souls and some monsters as playable origins, new weapons, soul-types, monsters and items (even MUSIC DANG IT).

These origins fall under 3 categories, each being dynamic compared to eachother. The following categories are:

## HUMANS ♥️

### _**This category adds the seven soul types!**_

> _"Long ago, two races ruled over Earth: HUMANS and MONSTERS. The first were smart magic wielders, who managed to seal after a long war the MONSTERS underground."_

❥ **Red Soul** ❤️ - 
Can switch to multiple modes (Purple, Yellow e.t.c), can ACT (Temporary buff) and use Items instantly to heal (vanilla only!), although can't naturally regenerate.

![Red Soul's mode change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee7d26290b3b8fa474b4fd38f60e2413890ca3d3.png)

❥ **Preserverance** 💜 - Attack Speed is increased upon dealing damage, Damage is increased every 4 attacks, recieves more EXP, but takes more damage from magic (Placeholder Passive, will be removed).

![Perseverance's Primary Ability  ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04c4451ecdbd36188ac3219cd73396478c67d74a.png)

❥ **Patience** 💙 Slower than everyone at practically anything, although exhausts MUCH less. You can slow down yourself even further down by concentrating, reducing damage taken [Primary]. 
You can also nullify the next hit's damage and apply a long lasting debuff on the enemy [Secondary].

![Patience's Concentration ability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8dca419f5bf55213812354d1268d90833694c98.png)

❥ **Justice** 💛 - Ranged demon. Can dash in all 4 directions, shoot Magic projectiles, use ranged weapons to deal increased damage to any player and deals bonus damage toward raiders But however can't wear high-tier armor.

![Justice's Yellow mode beam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b2569ad519e2c3398121f814afac0732086cdf4.png)

❥ **Bravery** 🧡 - Empowers melee combat by unleashing a flurry of damage bursts and move away enemies from your path with a Shield Bash [Secondary], while Fearless provides defensive bonuses when in a pinch. 
Rage accumulates during combat, enhancing damage output actively [Primary].

![PvP goes wild with this one](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2419df596ab424fe337abf25daec8ef4934cf48.png)

❥ **Kindness** 💚 - Can throw a fried egg which will give the target any buff of your choice, can heal your team with healing charges, and regen faster. At the cost of dealing less damage.

![Kindness's healing charges abillity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f3d636029cf7b5346a790e14fd66e15d6f2db2e.png)

❥ **Integrity** 💙 - The speedster of the group. Gains Momentum while running, deal more damage based on momentum you have, gain damage reduction for each 10% missing health, fall damage is reduced and air speed is increased, critical hits have a 200% damage multiplier instead of the regular 150%, and boost your jump height by crouching for two seconds.

## MONSTERS ♠ 
### _**This category adds some of the monsters!**_

> _"Long ago, two races ruled over Earth: HUMANS and MONSTERS. The second were fragile yet stronger creatures made entirely of magic. After a long war, they were sealing underground with a magic spell. "_

❥ **ASGORE DREEMUR** 🤍 - Massively increase ATK, HP and DEF, can use fire spells and summon a trident but can't wear armor.

![Spamming his spells](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d28e64ee5475caa5dd87cdf7db3126f214b7596.png)

❥ **Tem orngin!!!** 🤍 - Decent stat increases, higher jump and movement speed, scaring Creepers away, a 50% model size reduction, trading Gold Nuggets for miscellaneous items, and permanent Hero of the Village status characterize the abilities, but lacking additional skills. 

**Beware of the temmie armor**

![Temmie's secondary ability...I think](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ac2a3cb7bc2cd125b53c0f34296ceb0f3367d27.png)

❥ **Burgerpants** 🤍 -
Average stats, no leggings, crafting custom food items with two skills, and gaining DEF based on hamburger count in inventory. (I'm not kidding)

![The legendary hero has made me INVINCIBILEE!!!!!!!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebecdd81da989f297c1b68659af9bc30577bf393.png)

❥ **Undyne** 🤍 -
Incredibly strong with very high HP, capable of throwing spears and sucker-punching enemies 15 blocks away; also gains 3 lives with a 10s timer upon "death," but burns in the nether with armor unless enchanted with fire protection.

![Undyne's spear attack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7e02d6d274266965d25d74ceecd10df525027ab.png)

# FAQ ❓

## READ THIS BEFORE ASKING QUESTIONS IN THE FORUM



<details>
<summary>"This feature is broken"</summary>

First make sure you're on 1.20.1, and make sure you set up the datapack correctly. If you did all that, ask for help in the Discord forum in the Official origins discord server.

</details>



<details>
<summary>"Can you add [X] AU?"</summary>

The point of this pack is to try to make the origins as canon as possible, so no AU requests.

</details>



<details>
<summary>"Why is determination called "Red Soul"?"</summary>

Determination isn't exactly a soul trait, it's something all the human souls have.
also you learnt that from Glitchtale so shut up.


</details>


<details>
<summary>"Where's Gaster?"</summary>

He won't be a full origin per-say, but don't expect a full on boss origin. Like we stated: _We're trying to make this as canon as we can do_

</details>



<details>
<summary>"Where's Hate/Fear/X?"</summary>

Again, fanon AU's will not be made no matter what. And that includes soul types as well.

</details>



<details>
<summary>"When is the next update?"</summary>

Relax, it'll come out soon. We're working on it when we can, so you should appreciate that maybe.

</details>




# EXTRA (Coming Soon) 👁

> _"These characters don't fit in neither category, having no SOUL to be classified as HUMAN or MONSTER."_

❥ Chara (W.I.P) - Can soul-link to other human souls, evolving their origins.
